final:
// // This comment suggests that the D flip-flop does not have an enable signal.
module d_flip_flop (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input d,
    output reg q);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        q <= 0;
    end else if (enable) begin
        q <= d;
    end
end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment suggests that the D flip-flop does not have an enable signal.
